zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Manassès V de Réthel於大約1205年出生在法國德 艾斯特阿爾登斯雷特爾時，他的父親Hugh von Rethel II31歲，母親Felicite de Broyes30歲。他和Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1273年享年69歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Manassès V de Réthel于大约1205年出生在法国德 艾斯特阿爾登斯雷特爾时，他的父亲Hugh von Rethel II31岁，母亲Felicite de Broyes30岁。他和Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1273年享年69岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Réthel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Ithell ‘son of Ithel’, a personal name meaning ‘bountiful lord’. This name was adopted in Wales and elsewhere as a name for a chapel, as it is a homograph of a Biblical placename meaning ‘house of God’ in Hebrew (Genesis 12, 13, 28, and elsewhere in the Bible).
German: habitational name from Bethel in Westphalia.

variants.name: Ethel
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Ithell, Middle Welsh Ithael. See Bethel .

variants.name: Bethea
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Bethel  .
History: The name was brought to VA by John Bethea (known as ‘English John’) (1684– after 1750), who settled in Nansemond, VA.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Manassès V de Réthel was born about 1205, in Rethel, Ardennes, Grand Est, France, his father, Hugh von Rethel II, was 31 and his mother, Felicite de Broyes, was 30. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois. He died in 1273, at the age of 69, and was buried in Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Manassès V de Réthel est né environ 1205, à Rethel, Ardennes, Grand Est, France, son père, Hugh von Rethel II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Felicite de Broyes, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois. Il est décédé en 1273, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Manassès V de Réthel um 1205 in Rethel, Ardennes, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh von Rethel II 31 und seine Mutter Felicite de Broyes 30. Er hatte mit Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1273 im Alter von 69 Jahren und wurde in Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Manassès V de Réthel è nato il circa 1205 nel Rethel, Ardennes, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh von Rethel II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Felicite de Broyes, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois. Morì nel 1273, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.Broyes, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンブロイス

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Manassès V de Réthelが約1205年にフランスグランド エストアルデンスレスエルで生まれた時，父Hugh von Rethel IIは31歳，母Felicite de Broyesは30歳であった。彼はIsabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenoisとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1273年に69歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスeランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Manassès V de Réthel(이)가 대략 1205년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 아데네스 레테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh von Rethel II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Felicite de Broyes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 e런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Manassès V de Réthel nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Rethel, Ardennes, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Hugh von Rethel II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Felicite de Broyes, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois. Ele faleceu em 1273, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Manassès V de Réthel родился около 1205 г. в местности ретел, арденнесь, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh von Rethel II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Felicite de Broyes, 30. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois. Он умер в 1273 г. в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности eлан, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Manassès V de Réthel nació aproximadamente 1205, en Rethel, Ardennes, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Hugh von Rethel II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Felicite de Broyes, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Isabelle de Dampierre-en-Astenois. Murió en 1273, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
